name: chain__dmd_a_girl_on_x_last_week_who_had_340_
method: dm'd a girl on x last week who had 340 followers and a bio that said "digital products"figured she was another one just starting outchecked her gumroad. 1 product. a $39 notion template for tracking

stages.task: Search X for accounts with <1K followers + bio keywords (digital products, templates, notion, gumroad, creator). Extract profile, follower count, bio, links.
Check each creator's Gumroad/Whop/Etsy link. Extract product name, price, niche, estimated sales. Score by niche demand and replicability.
For top-scoring concepts, generate equivalent Notion templates with better design and copy. Package with screenshots and listing copy.
Create Gumroad listings with SEO-optimized titles, descriptions, and pricing ($19-39 range). Queue for posting.
